text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… It looks like that space over there is under renovation.
choice_data_list: <size=38>What kind of shop do you think is moving in?</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I wonder… Personally, I'd be happy if it were a race café. 
We could watch live broadcasts on a big screen, listen to 
other customers' predictions, things like that…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… an outdoor shop would be nice, too. 
A place to get binoculars, winter clothes, 
and other useful gear for watching races…

It was a weekend. I bumped into Chrono Genesis 
while shopping, so I decided to tag along with her.

Her intense passion for racing history. Every time I get 
a chance to see it, I'm struck by the same thought.
choice_data_list: <size=40>(I want to match her passion…!)</size>
(I want to match her passion…!)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Continuous shooting at fifteen frames per second, 
and thirty with an electronic shutter… Hmm… 
That's so nice… But, of course, not cheap…
choice_data_list: Looking for a new camera for races?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes… I've been feeling a bit unsatisfied with my current one. 
Although, with my allowance, my options are limited…

text_block_list.name: Camera Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Hello, are you looking for something in particular? 
If you'd like, I can help you find something within 
your budget.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
R-Really? Thank you so much! 
In that case…

text_block_list.name: Camera Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text:
With your current equipment, simply adding a new lens might 
do the trick. This one has a focal length of 70 to 300 mm. 
Its tracking for moving subjects is outstanding, too.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Wow…! 300 mm is more than enough for many racecourses. 
Even for the huge Tokyo Racecourse, with the right skills and 
positioning, it should still work out nicely…
choice_data_list: (I-Is that so…?)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
It has a unique mechanism to prevent camera shake and 
compensates for chromatic aberration well… Plus, I might 
just be able to afford a used one if I save up my allowance…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
……Ah. I-I'm sorry…! I got all excited 
and went off in my own world…
choice_data_list: I don't mind at all.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
"Game Theory of Wind and Horseshoes"… "Finding Tomorrow's 
Winning Methods In History's True Stories"… Yeah. Every book 
I want came up in the inventory search.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
However… it might take a while to go grab them all. 
This store is quite large… and the genres are spread 
all over the place…
choice_data_list: Then let's split up to gather them!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Eh… Ah, thank you so much. In that case, could I ask you 
to grab the science books? I'll go look for the history ones…

After finding the books she was looking for, I headed 
to our meeting spot. However, Chrono Genesis wasn't 
showing up.
choice_data_list: (Did something happen…?)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Records of abandoned racecourses…!? 
The oldest ones go back over a hundred years…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Amazing, what a find…! Information from back then is 
indispensable for understanding the path to modern racing, 
but historical documents like this are incredibly rare!
choice_data_list: Chrooono?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Huh…? …Aaah, Trainer…!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I'm sooo sorry…!! I found some valuable historical 
documents and just completely…
choice_data_list: I don't mind at all.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: B-But…

A profusely apologetic Chrono Genesis stood quietly 
beside me now. I looked around for something that 
might distract her.
choice_data_list: Hey, how about we check that out?
Hey, how about we check that out?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: A race café… I didn't realize there was one around here…
choice_data_list: We can enjoy the races together here!
We can enjoy the races together here!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… Yes, thank you so much…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…I really am making them go out of their way for me… 
And surely it's not just today…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer is a kind person… Even when I get completely 
absorbed in races, they just laugh and forgive me…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(But… if I keep causing them trouble like this, 
even they will eventually…)

text_block_list.name: Man With Pen Behind Ear
text_block_list.text: Whoa there, you two! Got a second?

Turning toward the voice, I saw a man and a woman 
holding a racing newspaper walk over, waving at us 
with smiles on their faces.
choice_data_list: Yes, what is it?

text_block_list.name: Woman In Horseshoe-Patterned Clothes
text_block_list.text:
We were just sharing our thoughts on the previous race. 
See here, marked in red on this newspaper…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Umm… 1800 m on turf… on a course that favors outrunners… 
Ah, this race…!

text_block_list.name: Man With Pen Behind Ear
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Did you watch it too, missy? 
Maaan! Number four ran a great race, didn't she!

text_block_list.name: Woman In Horseshoe-Patterned Clothes
text_block_list.text:
You're changing your tune pretty quickly. 
Who was it again that said this race would be tough for her?

text_block_list.name: Man With Pen Behind Ear
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know, she was on break for a long time, right? 
Even after she came back, she wasn't doing too hot, 
so I figured she'd have a hard time～

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Y-Yeah, exactly…! I'm really glad her strategy paid off…!

text_block_list.name: Woman In Horseshoe-Patterned Clothes
text_block_list.text: ? Strategy?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… Yes. Number four… It's true she hadn't produced any 
results since returning from her long break, but her graded 
stakes race two starts earlier wasn't actually that bad…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
In fact, considering her track record before her break, 
I believe those two preceding races helped her build her 
condition after returning and getting into the flow again.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
So she actually came into this race in rather good form, 
didn't she…! Even from a historical perspective, competitors 
who have taken this kind of approach ——

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …? Umm…?

text_block_list.name: Man With Pen Behind Ear
text_block_list.text:
Nah… I guess that's a horsegirl for you… 
You really know your stuff way better than we do…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …! I-I'm sorry for butting in with unnecessary details…!
choice_data_list:
Yep! She really is knowledgeable, and 
incredibly passionate about it, too!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Huh…?

text_block_list.name: Woman In Horseshoe-Patterned Clothes
text_block_list.text:
No kidding. The look in her eyes completely changed! 
I can tell she's seriously engrossed in racing…
choice_data_list: Indeed. I'm always overwhelmed by it myself.
Indeed. I'm always overwhelmed by it myself.

text_block_list.name: Man With Pen Behind Ear
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Sounds like you've got your hands full, buddy!
choice_data_list: But that's exactly why it's so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Man With Pen Behind Ear
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Sounds like you've got your hands full, miss!
choice_data_list: But that's exactly why it's so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
choice_data_list: <size=34>It inspires me, makes me want to catch up to her!</size>
<size=34>It inspires me, makes me want to catch up to her!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Thank you so much for today. 
For tagging along with me for so long…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: U-Umm… I had fun…… A lot of fun…
choice_data_list: I had fun too, and really felt your passion all day long!
I had fun too, and really felt your passion all day long!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: My… passion…
choice_data_list: So, I hope we can do this again, another time.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Ah, umm… yes! I-If you really don't mind, let's do it again…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Again… they said. Do you mean that, Trainer…?)
But that's exactly why it's so much fun!
It inspires me, makes me want to catch up to her!
It inspires me, makes me want to catch up to her!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…If it's true, then I'm glad… There are things 
I want to show you, too…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (About myself, and the things I love…)
